name: Oatmeal Banana Lebkuchen
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Mixed candied fruit, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together margarine and brown sugar until smooth.
3. Add honey, ground cinnamon, ginger, cardamom, and cloves; mix well.
4. Fold in peeled bananas and beaten eggs until combined.
5. Stir in flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt; mix until just incorporated.
6. Fold in chopped almonds and candied fruit.
7. Pour batter into a greased 9x13 inch pan.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and toothpick inserted comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool completely before serving.
